name: Lincoln's Birthday Meat Log
recipeIngredient: 6 Servings of prepared instant mashed potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together beef, bread crumbs, onion, margarine and season with pepper.
2. Beat egg until frothy. Add 2/3 cups milk to meat mixture and mix gently but thoroughly.
3. Shape the mixture into a 9x12-inch rectangle on wax paper.
4. Using the paper to lift the meat, roll it into a 9-inch cylinder.
5. Place the roll in a shallow pan and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
6. Prepare instant mashed potatoes as directed.
7. Add butter, onions, and season with salt to the potatoes.
8. Beat egg yolks.
9. Add milk to the potatoes.
10. Remove meat loaf from the oven and frost with mashed potatoes. Return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
11. Place cheese on top and broil until melted. Serves 6-8.
